name: Resistor
content: A passive two-terminal electrical component that implements electrical resistance as a circuit element.

name: Capacitor
content: A passive two-terminal electronic component that stores electrical energy in an electric field.

name: Diode
content: A two-terminal electronic component that conducts current primarily in one direction.

name: Transistor
content: A semiconductor device used to amplify or switch electronic signals.

name: MOSFET
content: A field-effect transistor used for switching and amplifying electronic signals.

name: Relay
content: An electrically operated switch that uses an electromagnet.

name: Transformer
content: A passive component that transfers electrical energy between circuits.

name: Battery
content: A device that stores chemical energy and converts it to electrical energy.
